overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city. The camera moves from a dark narrow alley onto a neon-lit street with wet asphalt reflections, passing under an elevated highway structure before approaching a plaza with escalators and digital billboards. The scene features heavy use of purple and blue neon lighting, futuristic vehicles, and modern glass architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a dark, narrow covered alleyway between tall buildings. The concrete path leads forward toward a distant light at the alley exit, with occasional shop windows providing dim illumination. The atmosphere is quiet and enclosed with minimal pedestrian presence.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right out of the dark alley into a dramatically lit urban street beneath an elevated highway. The scene opens up to reveal wet asphalt reflecting vibrant purple and blue neon lights from surrounding buildings and digital billboards. Large concrete support pillars line the right side of the street.

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along the wet multi-lane street beneath the elevated highway, passing between rows of massive support pillars. Futuristic vehicles are parked along the curb while digital advertising screens illuminate the scene with vibrant neon colors. The glass facades of commercial buildings reflect the artificial lighting.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the street onto a spacious pedestrian plaza with light-colored tile flooring. An escalator structure dominates the center background leading upward, while large curved digital screens display vibrant advertisements overhead. Several pedestrians are visible walking or running across the plaza toward the building entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, dark alleyway into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city. It begins by moving through a narrow covered passage between towering buildings, where dim shop windows provide the only light against the concrete path. As the camera turns right and exits the alley, the enclosed space opens into a vibrant urban street beneath an elevated highway, where wet asphalt begins to reflect brilliant purple and blue neon lights. The movement continues along this multi-lane road, passing between massive concrete support pillars and parked futuristic vehicles while the surrounding glass facades mirror the glow of digital advertising screens. Finally, the scene shifts from the street onto a spacious pedestrian plaza with light-colored tiles, moving toward a central escalator and curved digital billboards as pedestrians scatter across the open square.
